notifications_obligation_channel_date_id.name: notifications_obligation_channel_date_idx
notifications_obligation_channel_date_id.where: "notifications"."obligation_id" IS NOT NULL AND "notifications"."scheduled_date" IS NOT NULL

ceu_validity_check.name: ceu_validity_check
ceu_validity_check.value: "obligations"."ceu_completed" IS NULL OR "obligations"."ceu_required" IS NULL OR "obligations"."ceu_completed" <= "obligations"."ceu_required"
